name: OfficeMaker Create Document

body.document_json: {"type":"document","content":{"children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","text":"Dear Customer,"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","text":"This document was created from the OfficeMaker Make starter."}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","text":"Kind regards,"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","text":"OfficeMaker"}]}]}}

notes: Use this as the starter payload for a Make HTTP module.
